verdict: The current PR230 surface contains one genuine artifact in the source-Higgs contract: the Legendre/LSZ-normalized source-pole operator O_sp.  It is same-surface, same-source, invariant under source-coordinate rescaling, insensitive to analytic source contact terms, and passes the forbidden-import firewall.  It is not physical top-Yukawa closure because O_sp = O_H, C_spH/C_HH pole rows, Gram purity, scalar-LSZ production authority, and aggregate retained-route authorization remain absent.
